nasb.text: When Adam had lived one hundred and thirty years, he became the father of a son in his own likeness, according to his image, and named him Seth.

esv.text: When Adam had lived 130 years, he fathered a son in his own likeness, after his image, and named him Seth.

cnv.text: 亞當一百三十歲的時候，生了一個兒子，樣式和形象都和自己相似，就給他起名叫塞特。

ccb.text: 亚当一百三十岁生了一子，长相酷似自己，给他取名叫塞特。

csbs.text: 亚当活到一百三十岁时，生了一个儿子，样式和形像与自己相似；给他起名为塞特。
